description: RADIUS failure work queue from stable Data Connect dimensions. Counts cover the bounded ISE reporting view, not unique currently connected endpoints.

panels.title: Datasets
panels.description: Authoritative Data Connect dataset health. DOWN is not a valid zero.

targets.expr: max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"})
max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"})

panels.title: Collection Age
panels.description: Seconds since the last successful snapshot replacement; thresholds are based on this dataset cadence.

targets.expr: time() - max(ise_dataset_last_success_timestamp{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"})
time() - max(ise_dataset_last_success_timestamp{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"})

((100 * (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events_total - ise_dataconnect_radius_failure_events_total) / clamp_min(ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events_total, 1)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))

(ise_dataconnect_radius_failure_events_total and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))

panels.title: Active Sessions
panels.description: Latest accounting record per session ID is Start or Interim, not Stop. Depends on NAD accounting quality.

targets.expr: (ise_dataconnect_radius_active_sessions_total and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius_active",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))

(ise_dataconnect_radius_accounting_event_type_total{event_type="start"} and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))

sum by (status) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"}) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(sum by (authentication_method) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(sum by (authentication_protocol) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

topk(20, sum by (authorization_policy) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(sum by (psn) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(max by (psn) (ise_dataconnect_radius_response_time_seconds{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

topk(20, sum by (nad) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

topk(20, sum by (nad) (ise_dataconnect_radius_accounting_events{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(ise_dataconnect_radius_accounting_session_seconds{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad"}) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Top Error Codes

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (message_code, message_text) (ise_dataconnect_radius_errors{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.description: Top RADIUS error message codes over the bounded reporting window. Common codes are translated to a short description; codes without a known translation show the bare number. Extend the exporter message-code map to name more.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (nad) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{status=~"(?i)fail(ed)?|reject(ed)?",psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(sum by (nad, authentication_method) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{status=~"(?i)fail(ed)?|reject(ed)?",psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

sort_desc(sum by (psn) (ise_dataconnect_radius_errors{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad"})) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Certificate and PKI Errors
panels.description: Common certificate-related ISE message codes; tune this expression when Cisco adds codes to the targeted release.

targets.expr: (sum(ise_dataconnect_radius_errors{message_code=~"12300|12321|12500|12501|12511|12625|22056",psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad"}) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))) or on() (0 * ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1)))

panels.title: Failure Classes
panels.description: Failed authentications grouped into bounded reason classes from Cisco's aggregate RADIUS summary view.

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (failure_class) (ise_dataconnect_radius_failure_events)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Failed Authorization and Identity Summary
panels.description: Authorization profiles for failed authentications (a genuine partition — each failure carries one profile), plus documented identity-store, identity-group, device-type, and security-group dimensions. Each identity dimension independently re-partitions the SAME failed-event total, so bars are comparable WITHIN a dimension but never additive ACROSS dimensions. Dimensions that collapse to a single value (unpopulated in this deployment) are hidden.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (authorization_profile) (ise_dataconnect_radius_failure_events)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

topk(20, ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_summary_events{status="failed",dimension=~"identity_store|identity_group|device_type|security_group"} and on(dimension) (count by (dimension) (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_summary_events{status="failed",dimension=~"identity_store|identity_group|device_type|security_group"}) > 1)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Failure Locations
panels.description: Network-device locations associated with failed authentications in the bounded aggregate reporting window.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (location) (ise_dataconnect_radius_failure_events)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: RADIUS Failure Work Queue
panels.description: One row per failed-authentication combination of NAD, method, protocol, authorization policy, and PSN. The Ops Owner column is joined from the network-device group assignment; failures at NADs without a group assignment still appear with a blank owner. Error-code panels above remain sourced from the separate RADIUS errors view.

targets.expr: sort_desc((ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{status=~"(?i)fail(ed)?|reject(ed)?",psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"} * on(instance,nad) group_left(ops_owner,location) ise_network_device_ndg_assignment) or (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events{status=~"(?i)fail(ed)?|reject(ed)?",psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad",status=~"$status",authorization_policy=~"$authorization_policy"} unless on(instance,nad) ise_network_device_ndg_assignment)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Repeat Auth Intensity (attempts per endpoint)
panels.description: Average RADIUS authentication attempts per distinct endpoint over the bounded window — a repeat-pressure indicator. A rising line means fewer endpoints generating more attempts (repeat offenders / flapping supplicants). Per-endpoint repeat-offender identity is intentionally not exported: the Data Connect contract exposes no bounded per-endpoint repeat counter, and MAC/username are never labels.

targets.expr: (ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_events_total / on() clamp_min(sum(ise_dataconnect_radius_distinct_endpoints_total{source_view="radius_authentication_summary"}), 1)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Errors by Ops Owner
panels.description: RADIUS errors attributed to each Ops Owner by joining each error's NAD to the network-device group assignment. Errors at NADs with no group assignment are omitted from this owner rollup.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (ops_owner) (ise_dataconnect_radius_errors{psn=~"$psn",nad=~"$nad"} * on(instance,nad) group_left(ops_owner) ise_network_device_ndg_assignment)) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_radius",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Authentication Rate per PSN
panels.description: Passed/failed RADIUS authentication rate per PSN from the incremental authentication id-tail counter over $__rate_interval. Requires dataconnect.authentication_event_counters.

targets.expr: sum by (psn, result) (rate(ise_dataconnect_radius_authentication_tail_total{psn=~"$psn"}[$__rate_interval])) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_authentication_counters",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_authentication_counters",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))

panels.title: Accounting Event Rate per PSN
panels.description: RADIUS accounting event rate (Start/Stop/Interim) per PSN from the incremental accounting id-tail counter over $__rate_interval. Requires dataconnect.accounting_event_counters.

targets.expr: sum by (psn, event_type) (rate(ise_dataconnect_radius_accounting_tail_total{psn=~"$psn"}[$__rate_interval])) and on() ((max(ise_dataset_up{dataset="dataconnect_accounting_counters",source="dataconnect"}) == 1) and (max(ise_dataset_fresh{dataset="dataconnect_accounting_counters",source="dataconnect"}) == 1))
